# ⚠️ Legacy prototype — do not edit

This folder is the **original standalone UI prototype** (hardcoded demo recipe, no backend).
It is kept for reference only.

The **live, integrated frontend** — wired to the voice/AI backend — lives at:

    backend/handful/static/index.html

Edit and run the app from `backend/` (see `backend/README.md`). Changes made here will
**not** appear in the running app.
